title: 4 x 125 Grams Scented Candles, Soy Wax Aromatherapy Candle Gift Set for Women, Rose, Lavender, Vanilla, Lemongrass
features: The aromatherapy candle gift set includes 4 fragrances: Rose, Lavender, Vanilla, Lemongrass.
Each votive candle is 125 grams & burns for a 25-30 hours. Size: Diameter 7.5 x Height 5 cm.
Ideal Gift Set: The ideal relaxation set for birthdays, Christmas, anniversaries, Mother's & Father's Days, or other holidays that will delight people of all ages.
ECO-FRIENDLY 100% SOY - These candles are made with naturally biodegradable and eco-friendly pure soy wax.
WE GUARANTEE 100% SATISFACTION - We provide full refunds & returns if there's any problem after receiving the product.
description: Product description CAUTION: Burning it no longer than two hours each time. Take care not to let these goods be burned on! Place it on a heat resistant surface only. NEVER near anything that can catch fire. Special Gift Set Stuck on gift ideas for your special one? Need something for the folks? Packaged in an immaculately designed box, this 4 candle set is the ideal present for birthdays, Christmas, anniversaries, Mother’s & Father’s Days, or other holidays. Hours of Flickering Light Strike a match and light the candle to enjoy 25-30 hours of inviting aromas and a soft, welcoming glow. Each candle measures a generous 7.5 x 5 cm for use wherever you like. What’s in the package: 1 x Rose Candle 1 x Lavender Candle 1 x Vanilla Candle 1 x Lemongrass Candle Safety Warning Do not burn it for more than two hours each time. Make sure that this product does not burn Only place it on a heat-resistant surface. Never near something that can catch fire.
